flick.role: Press states, tick draws, focus. Confirms.

snap.role: Toggles, tab indicators, menus — one crisp overshoot. Switches.

drift.role: Large surfaces, ambient drift, parallax settle. Breathes.

recoil.role: Toasts, stamps, landings — two visible bounces. Celebrates.

motion.cascadeRule: Stagger interval = clamp(0.6 / (count - 1), 0.02, 0.06)s so the whole choreography stays under a 600ms budget; dense lists tighten automatically.
motion.exitRule: Exits are always tweens at 0.6x the enter duration with the exit easing — springs on exit read as indecision.
motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion is a first-class state. Transform enters become opacity fades; discrete springs snap to position with a color tween; direct manipulation keeps 1:1 tracking but drops inertia; autoplay loops go static; scroll-linked renders its final frame; number rolls swap instantly. Every component reads useMotionSafe(), never matchMedia directly.

props.name: Item.value / Item.disabled
props.description: Segment identity and per-segment disabling.

usageNotes: Full APG radio keyboard: arrows move and select (wrapping), Home and End jump, Space selects.
Under reduced motion the thumb appears under the active segment instantly — no travel, color only.

items.title: Triage Deck
items.tagline: Flick to accept, flick to reject.
items.description: A decision stack you flick through — throw a card right to accept or left to reject, a velocity-projected release commits, and the next card rises from behind.

props.name: cards
props.description: The queue; the top card is interactive, the rest peek behind.

props.name: onDecide
props.description: Fires when a card commits in either direction.

props.name: onEmpty
props.description: Fires when the last card is decided.

props.name: acceptLabel / rejectLabel
props.description: Button and affordance labels.

usageNotes: Arrow keys decide (left rejects, right accepts) and buttons drive it pointer-free; a live region announces each decision.
Under reduced motion cards cross-fade instead of flying off — dragging still tracks, without the throw.

items.title: Spark Chart
items.tagline: A trace that draws itself, then reads out.
items.description: A compact line or area chart that draws itself on arrival, then lets you scrub a crosshair that snaps to the nearest point and reads its value.

props.name: data
props.type: number[] | { x: number | string; y: number }[]
props.description: Bare numbers get index labels; objects carry their own x.

props.name: variant
props.description: Stroke only, or a filled area under the curve.

props.name: height / format
props.description: Chart height in px and value formatting for the readout.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name and summary for the trace.

usageNotes: Focus and arrow-key to move the crosshair; Home and End jump; the active point is announced.
Under reduced motion the trace renders fully drawn — scrubbing still works, without the draw-on.

items.title: Radial Bars
items.tagline: Bars that radiate from a hub.
items.description: A polar bar chart — wedges radiate from a hub, each growing to its value on the glide spring; hover or focus a wedge to brighten it and read its value in the hub.

props.name: data
props.type: { label: string; value: number; color?: string }[]
props.description: One wedge per entry; value drives its radial length.

props.name: max
props.description: Value that reaches the outer radius; defaults to the data max.

props.name: size / format
props.description: Diameter in px and value formatting for the readout.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the chart region.

usageNotes: Every wedge is a focusable data point announcing its label and value, so the chart is operable by keyboard.
Under reduced motion the wedges render at full length instantly — the hover/focus highlight is color only.

items.title: Coverflow
items.tagline: Covers that bank away in perspective.
items.description: A cover gallery in perspective — the active card faces you while its neighbors bank away and recede, and any card you steer to glides to the front.

props.name: children
props.description: Each direct child is a cover.

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active cover.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the gallery region.

usageNotes: Drag, wheel, click a side cover, or arrow-key to steer; a live region announces the active item.
Under reduced motion it flattens to a native scroll-snap row — no perspective, same controls.

items.title: Parallax Scene
items.tagline: Layers that part around the pointer.
items.description: A depth-layered diorama that parades its layers past the pointer — each sits at its own depth, the whole scene tilts toward your cursor and drifts back on leave.

props.name: children
props.description: ParallaxLayer elements, back to front (max ~4).

props.name: maxTilt
props.description: Degrees the scene rotates toward the pointer.

props.name: Layer.depth
props.description: 0 is far and moves least; 1 is near and moves most.

usageNotes: The parallax is decorative — layer content stays in normal flow and fully focusable.
Under reduced motion the layers render flat and stationary at their neutral position.

items.title: Tether Rope
items.tagline: Grab the cord; Verlet does the rest.
items.description: A hanging rope you grab and swing — a Verlet chain with gravity and length constraints, so it whips, goes taut, and settles like real cord.

props.name: nodes
props.description: Segment nodes, clamped to 4–16.

props.name: anchor
props.description: Pin the first node, or both ends like a slung cable.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Drag any point to swing the rope; a Reset button re-drops it. The loop pauses offscreen and when the tab is hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders a static hanging catenary — no simulation.

items.title: Pendulum Wave
items.tagline: Periods that part, then realign.
items.description: A rank of pendulums whose periods step apart — released together they drift through traveling waves and snap back into alignment on a fixed cycle.

props.name: count
props.description: Pendulums, clamped to 4–20.

props.name: amplitude / cycleSeconds / baseOscillations
props.description: Swing angle, realign-cycle length, and the longest pendulum's swing count.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Motion is analytic — each bob follows a closed-form cosine, so the realign cycle is exact. Restart re-aligns them.
Under reduced motion it renders one static fanned frame — no loop.

items.title: Rubber Sheet
items.tagline: Pull the membrane; it rings back.
items.description: A taut mesh you pull toward the pointer with a smooth falloff; release and the vertices fire home, ringing through equilibrium twice before they settle.

props.name: columns / rows
props.description: Mesh density; columns default 9, rows default 7.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the surface.

usageNotes: The release rides the recoil spring, so the sheet overshoots and settles in two visible bounces.
Under reduced motion the mesh deforms 1:1 while dragging but snaps flat on release — no ripple.

items.title: Iron Filings
items.tagline: A field that aligns to your cursor.
items.description: A canvas lattice of dash filings that align to the cursor like iron around a magnetic pole — near the pointer they snap radial and brighten, far off they relax and dim.

props.name: spacing
props.description: Pixels between filings in the grid (clamped 16–48).

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px when used standalone.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: The canvas loop pauses offscreen and when the tab is hidden; colors re-resolve on a theme flip.
Under reduced motion it renders one static lattice frame — no loop, no cursor response.

items.title: Swarm Field
items.tagline: A flock that scatters from your cursor.
items.description: A canvas flock of boids that murmur with emergent flocking and scatter from the cursor, then regroup — separation, alignment, cohesion, and flee, on a spatial hash.

props.name: count
props.description: Boid count, clamped to 10–100.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px when used standalone.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: Neighbor queries run on a spatial hash, so the flock stays near O(n); the loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one settled frame — no loop, no scatter.

items.title: Magnetic Cursor
items.tagline: Targets that reach for the cursor.
items.description: A pointer layer for fine cursors — a drift-lagged spotlight trails the cursor and any MagneticTarget leans toward it, then springs back; inert on touch and reduced motion.

props.name: MagneticCursor.size
props.description: Spotlight follower diameter in px.

props.name: MagneticTarget.strength
props.description: Fraction of the pointer offset a target follows.

props.name: MagneticTarget.radius
props.description: Activation radius in px around the target.

usageNotes: Wrap real controls in MagneticTarget — the transform layer never touches focus or clicks.
Active only on (pointer:fine) with motion allowed; otherwise children render untouched.

items.title: Aurora Ribbon
items.tagline: Light ribbons that lean toward the cursor.
items.description: Slow sinusoidal ribbons of light that undulate across the field like an aurora and bend toward the pointer — a calm, luminous canvas backdrop.

props.name: bands
props.description: Number of ribbons, clamped to 1–6.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px when used standalone.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: Ribbons bloom where they overlap (additive compositing); the loop pauses offscreen and when the tab is hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one static frame — no undulation, no pointer response.

items.title: Point Globe
items.tagline: A dotted planet you spin.
items.description: A globe of points on a Fibonacci sphere that drifts on its own and spins under your drag, carrying angular momentum — near points brighten, the far side dims.

props.name: points
props.description: Dots on the sphere, clamped to 120–700.

props.name: autoRotate
props.description: Idle drift when not being dragged.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Drag to spin; release carries momentum that decays back to the idle drift. The loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders a static globe — no drift, no momentum.

items.title: Voronoi Shatter
items.tagline: Tap and the tessellation shatters, then reseals.
items.description: A Voronoi tessellation that fractures outward from your tap — shards fly, rotate, and fade, then ring back into place and reseal on the recoil spring.

props.name: cells
props.description: Voronoi seed sites, clamped to 8–60.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the surface.

usageNotes: Cells are a real Voronoi built from half-plane clipping, computed once; the shard transforms repaint imperatively from one progress spring.
Under reduced motion a tap leaves the tessellation whole — no shatter.

items.title: Comet Cursor
items.tagline: A comet that chases the pointer.
items.description: A contained field where the pointer drags a luminous comet — a bright head with a tapering tail that thickens with speed and collapses when you rest.

props.name: trail
props.description: Trail sample count, clamped to 8–64.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: The tail widens with pointer speed and collapses into the head at rest; the loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one static frame — no trail, no pointer response.

items.title: Ripple Surface
items.tagline: Tap and wavefronts interfere.
items.description: Tap the surface and a wavefront propagates out; tap again and the rings overlap into visible interference — a calm canvas pond that answers every touch.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: Concurrent ripples are pooled and capped; crests reinforce where wavefronts cross. The loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one calm static frame — a tap does not propagate.

items.title: Flow Diagram
items.tagline: Quantity, flowing between nodes.
items.description: A Sankey flow — nodes in columns, links sized to their value with a marching-dash current, and a hover that traces a node's whole upstream and downstream path.

props.name: nodes
props.type: { id: string; label: string; column: number }[]
props.description: Graph nodes with their column placement.

props.name: links
props.type: { source: string; target: string; value: number }[]
props.description: Flows; value drives link thickness.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Hover or focus a node to trace its connected path; an sr-only summary lists every flow.
Under reduced motion the dashes stop marching — the highlight is color only.

items.title: Timeline Spine
items.tagline: A playhead that rides your scroll.
items.description: A scroll-linked timeline — a playhead rides the spine as you scroll, the spine fills behind it, and each event pops in as the head reaches it.

props.name: events
props.type: { title: string; detail?: ReactNode; marker?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: Ordered events rendered along the spine.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the timeline region.

usageNotes: Events are a semantic ordered list, readable regardless of motion; the spine and playhead are decorative.
Under reduced motion everything renders in its final state — no scroll-driven animation.

items.title: Pull to Refresh
items.tagline: Pull past the detent; rows cascade in.
items.description: Over-pull the list past a calibrated detent and release — it holds to refresh, then settles back as the fresh rows cascade in.

props.name: onRefresh
props.description: Called when a past-detent pull is released.

props.name: children
props.description: The scrollable content.

props.name: threshold
props.description: Pixels past which release triggers a refresh.

usageNotes: Only engages when the list is scrolled to the top; a focusable Refresh button keeps it operable without a pointer.
Under reduced motion the pull eases home without overshoot and the new rows fade in once — no cascade.

items.title: Orbit Menu
items.tagline: A dial of options that snaps to a detent.
items.description: Items ring a hub and rotate on a weighted dial — flick the ring and it flings, then snaps the nearest item into the active detent at the top.

props.name: items
props.type: { id: string; label: string; icon?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: Options placed evenly around the ring.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active item.

props.name: size
props.description: Ring diameter in px.

usageNotes: Drag to spin, click an item, or arrow-key to rotate; a live region announces the active item.
Under reduced motion selection snaps to the detent instantly — no fling momentum.

items.title: Spark Burst
items.tagline: Restraint as celebration.
items.description: A calibrated celebration, not confetti — call fire() and a tight radial burst of hairline rays and a fast ring shoots out and fades, monochrome with a signal glint.

props.name: ref.fire(opts?)
props.description: Imperative handle — call it to emit one burst.

props.name: rays / spread
props.description: Ray count (default 12) and travel distance in px (default 40).

props.name: color
props.description: Ray color.

usageNotes: Get a ref of type SparkBurstHandle and call fire(); rapid fires stack and clean themselves up.
Under reduced motion fire() gives a single centered pulse — no radiating rays.

items.title: Heart Tap
items.tagline: Pop, sparks, and a rolling count.
items.description: A like that celebrates — the heart squashes then pops, a tight ring of sparks bursts once, and the count rolls up; un-liking deflates and rolls back down.

props.name: liked / defaultLiked / onChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled liked state; onChange gets { liked, count }.

props.name: count / defaultCount
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled count, clamped at zero.

props.name: size
props.description: Heart glyph size in px.

usageNotes: A real toggle button — Space/Enter like, aria-pressed and the count are announced.
Under reduced motion the fill switches and the count swaps instantly — no pop, sparks, or roll.

items.title: Reaction Fly
items.tagline: Reactions that bloom, then fly.
items.description: Press to bloom a reaction picker; choosing one sends a copy flying up — rising, drifting, and fading on its own jittered path — while its tally ticks up.

props.name: reactions
props.type: { id: string; label: string; node?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: The pickable reactions; defaults to a curated set.

props.name: onReact
props.description: Fires with the reaction id on each selection.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the trigger.

usageNotes: Full menu semantics — the trigger has aria-haspopup, items are menuitems, Escape closes, and each reaction is announced.
Under reduced motion the picker opens without stagger and selecting bumps the tally with no fly-up.

items.title: Depth Stack
items.tagline: Browse the pile, layer by layer.
items.description: A face-on pile of layers browsed along the z-axis — scroll a notch, drag, or arrow through; the active layer sits crisp while the rest recede into a stepped skyline of peeking headers.

props.name: layers
props.description: Three to eight layers, front to deepest.

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active layer; fires once per settle.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Required — names the layer stack.

usageNotes: Arrows and the wheel move one layer, Home and End jump on the glide spring, tick-rail buttons carry aria-current, and settles are announced.
Under reduced motion the active layer renders alone beneath a compressed label shelf with instant swaps.

items.title: Peek Portal
items.tagline: Lean around it, then step through.
items.description: A framed aperture with a scene that counter-shifts against the frame as you lean around it — two layers moving oppositely sell the depth — and a click that zooms through the portal into the full view.

props.name: scene / beyond
props.description: What shows through the aperture, and the view you step into.

props.name: depth
props.description: Peak counter-shift in px.

props.name: onStep
props.description: Fires stepping through and back.

props.name: sceneLabel / backLabel
props.description: Accessible names for the frame button and the back chip.

usageNotes: The frame is a real button — stepping through moves focus to the back chip and returning restores it; both moves are announced.
Under reduced motion there is no parallax and both steps are instant crossfades.

items.title: Strata Scroll
items.tagline: Seams that open in passing.
items.description: Strata that separate as scroll passes between them — each seam hides an interlayer note that wakes at the viewport center while the upper plate leans back and the lower leans forward, all scrubbed 1:1 from scroll through transforms alone.

props.name: strata
props.description: Three to six strata; each note hides in the seam below its stratum.

props.name: onFocusChange
props.description: Fires when the stratum nearest center changes.

props.name: height
props.description: Viewport height in px.

usageNotes: A keyboard-scrollable labelled region; the active stratum carries the accent and is announced politely.
Under reduced motion the notes render as static dividers and only active tracking remains — nothing leans.

items.title: Hover Relief
items.tagline: The board rises to meet your hand.
items.description: A tile grid that extrudes toward the cursor like a relief map — a gaussian falloff lifts neighbors proportionally on pure motion-value writes, focus raises a tile to full height, and clicks pop on the recoil spring.

props.name: tiles
props.description: Six to twenty-four action tiles.

props.name: columns / maxLift / radius
props.description: Grid shape, peak extrusion in px, and falloff radius in tile units.

props.name: onTileClick
props.description: Fires on tile activation.

usageNotes: Every tile is a real button — keyboard focus lifts it to full height and Enter pops it like a click.
Under reduced motion the relief is a flat hover highlight and clicks fire without the pop.

items.title: Focus Rack
items.tagline: Rack focus between the planes.
items.description: Layered planes at staggered depths with one in focus — the rest wait soft and dim behind it; racking focus dollies the chosen plane forward on the glide spring while the previous one settles back into the blur.

props.name: planes
props.description: Two to four planes, nearest first.

props.name: focusId / defaultFocusId / onFocusChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled focused plane.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The rail chips are the keyboard path — real buttons with aria-pressed; the focused plane is announced politely.
Under reduced motion focus swaps with a fast tween and no dolly; the soft blur is capped at 3px everywhere.

items.title: Layer Peel
items.tagline: Peel past the detent or snap back.
items.description: Drag the corner grip and the top sheet peels back on its left hinge, shading as it lifts while the layer beneath rises to meet it — release past the detent to tear it away, release early and it recoils shut.

props.name: layers
props.description: Two to six sheets, top first.

props.name: onPeel
props.description: Fires as a sheet tears away.

props.name: loop
props.description: Cycle back to the first sheet after the last.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The grip is a real button — a plain click or Enter performs a full peel, so the keyboard tears the same sheet.
Under reduced motion peeling advances instantly with no hinge or recoil.

items.title: Slice Compare
items.tagline: A blade, not a wipe.
items.description: A comparison divider struck as a blade — it leans into the cut as you drag and swings back plumb on release, parting two scenes with cast shadows on both sides of the edge.

props.name: before / after
props.description: The two scenes either side of the blade.

props.name: beforeLabel / afterLabel
props.description: Corner labels and the slider valuetext.

props.name: defaultPosition / onPositionChange
props.description: Starting cut position (0-100) and the change callback.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The handle is a real slider — arrows nudge by two, Page keys by ten, Home and End reach the rails.
Under reduced motion the blade stays plumb and tracks the pointer one-to-one.

items.title: Depth Lens
items.tagline: Cut a hole to the layer beneath.
items.description: An x-ray lens that chases the pointer on the glide spring and cuts through the surface to the layer beneath — the aperture is a registered second copy, so the two layers line up perfectly under the glass.

props.name: surface / beneath
props.description: The visible layer and the one exposed inside the lens.

props.name: radius
props.description: Lens radius in px.

props.name: surfaceLabel / beneathLabel
props.description: Corner labels naming the layers.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The stage is focusable and arrows steer the lens; on coarse pointers a tap re-anchors it.
Under reduced motion the lens rests at center and keyboard moves are instant.

items.title: Altitude List
items.tagline: Magnitude you can read as height.
items.description: Readings that float at altitudes — every plate lifts off its ground line in proportion to its value, casting a contact shadow that lengthens with height; re-sorting flies the plates to their new rank while the altitudes hold.

props.name: items
props.description: Three to eight readings.

props.name: defaultSort / onSortChange
props.description: Starting order and the change callback.

usageNotes: Sort chips are real buttons with aria-pressed; the reorder rides layout animation on the glide spring.
Under reduced motion plates sit flat with value bars and re-orders are instant.

items.title: Horizon Rise
items.tagline: Stand up over the horizon.
items.description: Sections that rise from below a ground-plane horizon — each lies tipped back beyond the line until scroll carries it into view, then stands upright on the glide spring beneath a converging ground grid.

props.name: sections
props.description: The sections that rise as they enter view.

props.name: once
props.description: Animate only on the first entrance.

props.name: height
props.description: Optional internal scroll stage; omit to ride the page.

usageNotes: With a height it is a keyboard-scrollable labelled region; without one it rides the page scroll.
Under reduced motion sections simply fade in place with no tilt or rise.

items.title: Facet Cube
items.tagline: Six faces, one cube, snap detents.
items.description: A six-face content cube with real CSS geometry — drag to rotate with per-pixel resistance, release and it snaps both axes to the nearest 90° detent, or walk faces with the arrow keys; the facing face is announced on settle.

props.name: faces
props.description: Up to six face plates; missing faces render empty.

props.name: labels
props.description: Per-face names for the screen-reader announcement.

props.name: size
props.description: Cube edge in px; the wrapper pads for mid-turn corners.

props.name: defaultFace / onFaceChange
props.description: Starting face and the settle callback.

usageNotes: A focusable group with aria-roledescription — arrows rotate one detent, Home returns to face one, and the facing face is announced politely.
Under reduced motion the cube renders flat: one face at a time, instant swaps, same keys and announcements.

items.title: Prism Flip
items.tagline: Three panels on one rolling prism.
items.description: A triangular prism that rolls toward the viewer between three panels — tap to advance, drag vertically against the detents, or step with the arrow keys; true equilateral geometry with edge shading.

props.name: panels
props.description: The three faces; extra entries are ignored.

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled facing panel.

props.name: labels
props.description: Per-panel names for the announcement.

props.name: height
props.description: Panel height in px; clearance is derived from it.

usageNotes: A focusable rotator — arrows step panels, Home returns to the first, and the facing panel is announced politely.
Under reduced motion the prism renders one flat panel with instant crossfade swaps.

items.title: Coin Toggle
items.tagline: Heads on, tails off.
items.description: A switch struck as a coin — it flips 180° in true perspective on every toggle, always forward, and lands with an edge-wobble on the recoil spring; faces are yours to mint.

props.name: checked / defaultChecked / onCheckedChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled switch state.

props.name: size
props.description: Coin diameter in px.

props.name: faces
props.description: Custom face artwork; defaults to minted glyphs.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Required accessible name for the bare switch.

usageNotes: A real role=switch button — Space and Enter flip it, aria-checked tracks state, and focus-visible rings are never removed.
Under reduced motion the faces crossfade with no flip or wobble — the accent change carries the state.

items.title: Dice Roll
items.tagline: A die that always answers.
items.description: Hold to charge — the die swells and shivers while an arc fills — then release to tumble two full turns and land on a face you chose: outcomes come from a prop or a fixed sequence, never chance.

props.name: value / onRoll
props.description: Controlled outcome for the next roll, and the landing callback.

props.name: sequence
props.description: Uncontrolled outcomes, cycled in order — deterministic by design.

props.name: size
props.description: Die edge in px.

usageNotes: A real button — hold Space or Enter to charge, release to roll; Escape aborts a charge; the result is announced politely.
Under reduced motion there is no shiver or tumble — release swaps straight to the outcome face and announces it.

items.title: Gimbal Dial
items.tagline: Two rings, two channels, one hub.
items.description: A two-axis picker built as nested rings in perspective — spin the outer band for one value and the inner for the other; flicks carry momentum, releases settle on detents, and a hub reads both channels live.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled 0–100 per axis; fires once per settled detent.

props.name: step
props.description: Detent size in value units.

props.name: size
props.description: Outer ring diameter in px.

props.name: axisLabels
props.description: Accessible names for the two slider bands.

usageNotes: Each ring is an independent role=slider — arrows step it, Home and End jump, and aria-valuenow tracks the detents.
Under reduced motion the rings render flat and drags update values directly with no momentum.

items.title: Rolodex List
items.tagline: A wheel of records with a crest.
items.description: Records on a vertical wheel — drag, scroll a notch at a time, or arrow through; cards flip over the crest, the front record carries the accent, and Enter pulls it. A selection control, not a display drum.

props.name: items
props.description: The records on the wheel.

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled front record; change fires on settle.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Explicit activation — Enter, Space, or a tap on the front card.

props.name: height / loop
props.description: Viewport height in px, and whether the wheel wraps.

usageNotes: A real listbox — aria-activedescendant tracks the front record, arrows rotate one step, and the wheel only captures scroll while the pointer is over it.
Under reduced motion it renders a flat three-row list with instant swaps and the same semantics.

items.title: Wheel Picker
items.tagline: Options on a drum, settled by detent.
items.description: A value picker built as a recessed drum — options curve beneath a fixed selection window, drags carry momentum into detents, every landing ticks the window caps, and letter keys typeahead straight to an option.

props.name: options
props.description: The drum's rows.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled selection; fires once per settle.

props.name: visibleRows / height
props.description: Window size and control height.

props.name: aria-label / aria-labelledby
props.description: One is required — it is a bare form control.

usageNotes: A real listbox — arrows and Page keys step rows, Home and End jump, letters typeahead, and the wheel only captures scroll over the control.
Under reduced motion the drum renders as a flat column with instant swaps and the same window styling.

items.title: Flip Mosaic
items.tagline: One grid, two boards, a traveling flip.
items.description: Two boards on one grid — every tile carries an A face and a B face, and toggling sweeps a cascade of Y-flips across the mosaic from your chosen origin, always inside the choreography budget.

props.name: tiles
props.description: Each tile's two faces.

props.name: side / defaultSide / onSideChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled facing board.

props.name: origin
props.description: Where the cascade wave begins.

props.name: columns / tileAspect / gap
props.description: Grid shape.

usageNotes: Interactive mode is a single role=switch button — Space and Enter flip the board and the settled side is announced.
Under reduced motion there is no cascade or 3D — the whole board crossfades at once.

items.title: Orrery
items.tagline: An orbital system with a focus slot.
items.description: Bodies orbit a hub on inclined elliptical paths — inner rings run faster, the whole system pauses when unwatched, and clicking a body flies it forward into a focus card until Escape sends it home.

props.name: items
props.description: Up to eight orbiting bodies; default faces are minted discs.

props.name: hub / detail
props.description: The center piece and the focus-card renderer.

props.name: radius / inclineDeg / period
props.description: Orbit geometry and the outer revolution time in seconds.

props.name: onFocusChange
props.description: Fires when a body is captured or released.

usageNotes: Every body is a real button — Enter captures it, Escape releases, and captures are announced politely; the orbit pauses under keyboard focus.
The loop pauses offscreen and when the tab hides, with the clock rebased on resume; under reduced motion the system rests at its phase positions and captures swap instantly.

items.title: Balance Mobile
items.tagline: Torque you can tug.
items.description: A hanging mobile with honest torque — pods hang from beams whose tilt is computed from the loads beneath them; pull a pod and every beam above re-tilts live, then the whole rig swings back through equilibrium on release.

props.name: items
props.description: Up to four pods; weight defaults to one.

props.name: height
props.description: Rig height in px.

usageNotes: Every pod is a real button — Space or Enter gives it a tug, announced politely; drags add weight proportional to the pull.
Under reduced motion the rig rests at equilibrium and tugs read as a small instant tilt with no swing.

items.title: Dolly Frame
items.tagline: The world rushes; the subject holds.
items.description: The vertigo push-in — scroll rushes the corridor wide with every arch scaling faster by depth while the subject holds its size dead center, letterbox bars tightening and the focal readout climbing from 24 to 85mm.

props.name: subject / backdrop
props.description: The held plate, and the vista behind (defaults to the corridor).

props.name: onDolly
props.description: Streams the push, deduped to twentieths.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only line describes the shot; the region scrolls natively and the visuals are presentational.
Under reduced motion the frame holds a mid-push composition while the readout still tracks.

items.title: Orbit Stage
items.tagline: Orbit the stage; a station swings to the front.
items.description: A three-station specimen turntable — drag orbits the camera around the staged group, the plates billboarded so they always face you while position, scale, and stacking carry the depth; release glides on the thrown momentum and snaps a station to the front, the pedestal ring ticking off its 120-degree detents.

props.name: plates
props.description: The stations; the first three seat the turntable.

props.name: station / defaultStation
props.description: Controlled or initial front plate id.

props.name: onStationChange
props.description: Fires the front plate id once the orbit settles.

props.name: radius / height
props.description: Orbit radius and stage height in px.

usageNotes: Only the front plate is tabbable and live; back plates are inert and aria-hidden until they settle forward.
The frame is a focusable group — arrows rotate one station, Home returns to the first.
Under reduced motion the poses swap in a single frame with a fast crossfade; every flight is stopped on unmount.

items.title: Tunnel Dive
items.tagline: Scroll dives; each gate blows past.
items.description: A dive through receding frames — scroll flies the camera down a z-tunnel where each gate rushes from a far speck to blow past the lens, a starburst cresting between gates and the depth readout counting them off as they pass.

props.name: frames
props.description: The gates to fly through, front to back.

props.name: onFramePass
props.description: Fires as each gate blows past, deduped ascending.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only list carries the gates; the region scrolls natively and the depth visuals are presentational.
Passes dedupe ascending and re-arm on scroll-back, so a gate never double-fires.
Under reduced motion the tunnel reads as a flat outlined list with a nearest-gate readout.

items.title: Pan Window
items.tagline: Pan the ridge; markers step to the glass.
items.description: A wide dusk ridge behind glass — drag-pan across the panorama with rubber-resisting edges while three depth bands trail at parallax; survey markers pinned along the ridge step forward as each crosses the center third, their detail lines unfurling, and a bearing readout tracks the sweep.

props.name: hotspots
props.description: Two to four markers pinned across the vista by x (0..1).

props.name: onVisit
props.description: Fires when a centered marker is activated.

props.name: height / panoramaWidth
props.description: Window height in px and panorama span in window widths.

usageNotes: Markers are real buttons — focusing glides one to center, Enter visits; a pointer click visits a centered marker and pans an off-center one to center.
The frame is a focusable group — arrows pan by 15% of the window, Home and End jump to the ends.
Under reduced motion the pan resolves instantly with a hard clamp; the vista is seeded off the serial and identical every render.

items.title: Zoom Atlas
items.tagline: Click a sector; the camera flies in.
items.description: Semantic zoom made physical — the atlas is a grid of sectors, and clicking one flies the camera into it, the whole board scaling about that cell until it fills the frame; a breadcrumb hangs at the top to fly you back out to the overview.

props.name: regions
props.description: Sectors laid on a near-square grid; each a zoom target.

props.name: columns
props.description: Grid columns; the fill scale keys off it.

props.name: onZoom
props.description: Fires the focused sector id, null on return to overview.

props.name: height
props.description: Atlas height in px.

usageNotes: Sectors are real buttons — Enter flies in, Escape or the breadcrumb flies back out.
onZoom fires the id on entry and null on return, deduped against the current view.
Under reduced motion the fly is an instant swap between the overview grid and a full-frame sector.

items.title: Crane Scroll
items.tagline: Scroll cranes the camera from plan to elevation.
items.description: A crane shot on a scroll track — the ground plane tips from an overhead plan to an eye-level elevation as you scroll, its plots standing up into view while their labels billboard to stay readable, a stage readout naming the shot from top-down through three-quarter to front.

props.name: tiles
props.description: Plots seated on the ground plane, front to back.

props.name: journey
props.description: Scroll track length as a multiple of height.

props.name: onCrane
props.description: Streams the crane 0..1, deduped to twentieths.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only line describes the crane; the region scrolls natively and the 3D scene is presentational.
Labels billboard against the plane so they stay upright through the whole crane.
Under reduced motion the scene holds a three-quarter pose while the readout still names the shot.

items.title: Look Room
items.tagline: Look around the room; a plaque swings to face you.
items.description: A room you look around from the inside — the pointer tilts the interior within a fixed field of view, five walls shaded so the corners read, and plaques pinned across them are focusable; focusing one glides the room to face it, and activating it logs the look.

props.name: hotspots
props.description: Plaques pinned to the front, left, or right wall by at (0..1).

props.name: onLook
props.description: Fires when a plaque is faced and activated.

props.name: depth / height
props.description: Room depth and stage height in px.

usageNotes: Pointer-look is gated to fine pointers; on touch the focused stage looks around with the arrow keys.
Plaques are real buttons — focusing one glides the room to face it, Enter logs the look.
Under reduced motion the room collapses to a flat, wall-grouped list of focusable plaques with no 3D.

items.title: Camera Rail
items.tagline: Ride the rail; a station snaps to the platform.
items.description: A content monorail that rides past a fixed camera — cars recede left and right of the platform, a drag or the arrow keys drive the rail, and a release throws it on momentum before it snaps the nearest station to center under a stop marker.

props.name: stations
props.description: Cars evenly spaced along the rail, left to right.

props.name: value / defaultStation
props.description: Controlled or initial station at the platform.

props.name: onArrive
props.description: Fires the station id once it settles at the platform.

props.name: height
props.description: Rail stage height in px.

usageNotes: The frame is a focusable group — arrows ride one station, Home and End run to the ends; cars ride to center on click.
A release throws the rail on momentum then snaps to the nearest station, deduped against the last arrival.
Under reduced motion every gesture jumps to its nearest station with no glide or momentum.

items.title: Pivot Grid
items.tagline: Click a card; the wall turns into its room.
items.description: A wall of cards that turns a corner — clicking one pivots the whole assembly a quarter turn on its hinge so the wall swings away edge-on and that card's room swings in to face you; Escape or the room's back control turns you back to the wall.

props.name: cards
props.description: Wall cards; each carries an optional room face.

props.name: columns
props.description: Wall grid columns.

props.name: onEnter
props.description: Fires the entered card id, null on return to the wall.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Cards are real buttons — Enter turns into the room, Escape or the back control turns home; focus follows into and out of the room.
onEnter fires the card id on entry and null on return, deduped.
Under reduced motion the pivot is an instant swap between the wall grid and the room.

items.title: Elevator Nav
items.tagline: Call a floor; the doors part on arrival.
items.description: Section navigation as an elevator ride — calling a floor rides the car past the floors between, a dial ticking through the numbers as they pass, and two doors part on arrival to reveal the floor; a new call shuts them and rides on.

props.name: floors
props.description: Floors top to bottom; the call panel mirrors the order.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or initial floor.

props.name: onArrive
props.description: Fires the floor id once the doors part on arrival.

props.name: height
props.description: Shaft stage height in px.

usageNotes: Call-panel buttons and the shaft take arrow keys to change floors; the dial derives its number from the car, never a per-frame write.
A new call shuts the doors, rides, and parts them on the settle; onArrive fires once per arrival, deduped.
Under reduced motion the floor swaps instantly, the dial jumps, and the doors skip their travel.

items.title: Glass Pane
items.tagline: Sheets that part for your hand.
items.description: Stacked translucent sheets that separate in depth when your hand arrives — each glass slides out along its own diagonal on the glide spring while a specular highlight tracks the pointer across the top sheet.

props.name: sheets
props.description: Two to four sheets, rear first.

props.name: separation
props.description: Peak separation per sheet step, in px.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Keyboard focus inside any sheet separates the stack exactly like hover.
Under reduced motion the sheets rest slightly fanned with a fixed highlight.

items.title: Foil Card
items.tagline: The light moves, not the card.
items.description: A holographic foil card where only the light moves — the sheen chases the pointer across fine striping, rotating hue with the travel, and pressing stamps a bright flash into the foil.

props.name: children / emblem
props.description: Card content, and foil-only artwork for the strongest sheen.

props.name: intensity
props.description: Sheen strength, 0-1.

props.name: onStamp
props.description: Fires on the press flash.

usageNotes: The whole card is a real button — Space and Enter stamp it, and the focus ring is never removed.
Under reduced motion the sheen rests at a fixed angle and the stamp is an opacity-only flash.

items.title: Slat Wall
items.tagline: Seven louvers, one swap.
items.description: A louver wall — content sliced across horizontal slats that each rotate on their own axis in a cascading wave to swap between two faces; every slat is a window onto the full face, so any content survives the slicing.

props.name: a / b
props.description: The wall's two full-size faces.

props.name: side / defaultSide / onSideChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled facing side.

props.name: slats / height
props.description: Louver count and wall height.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Required — the wall is one switch button.

usageNotes: One real role=switch button — Space and Enter flip the wall and the facing side is announced.
Under reduced motion the faces crossfade whole with no wave.

items.title: Fold Out
items.tagline: Creases that open in order.
items.description: An origami strip unfolding in staged hinges — one progress spring drives every crease, each panel's hinge mapped to a later slice of the travel so the sheet opens stage by stage with shading lifting as each fold flattens.

props.name: panels
props.description: Up to four panels, unfolding top to bottom.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled fold state.

props.name: panelHeight
props.description: Height of each panel in px.

props.name: openLabel / closeLabel
props.description: Toggle wording.

usageNotes: The toggle is a real button with aria-expanded; the strip height animates with the folds so layout follows honestly.
Under reduced motion panels simply appear and disappear with a fast fade.

items.title: Height Field
items.tagline: Sculpt the ground; the lines follow.
items.description: A canvas terrain you sculpt by hand — a gaussian brush raises or carves the ground while survey isolines redraw as the field settles back toward its seeded base; the loop idles the moment nothing moves.

props.name: levels / brush / relax
props.description: Isoline count, brush radius in px, and settle retention.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: RAISE and CARVE are real chip buttons; the canvas is presentational behind a labelled wrapper with a described interaction.
The loop pauses offscreen and in hidden tabs, idles when settled, and under reduced motion renders one static seeded frame.

items.title: Curtain Lift
items.tagline: A hem that travels as a wave.
items.description: A draped curtain of sine-fold strips over a stage — raising it sends the folds up with a center-out stagger so the hem travels as a wave, or part mode compresses the halves toward the wings.

props.name: children
props.description: The stage the curtain conceals.

props.name: mode
props.description: Straight up, or split to the wings.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled rig state.

props.name: folds / height
props.description: Strip count and stage height.

usageNotes: One real toggle button with aria-expanded runs the rig, and the curtain state is announced politely.
Under reduced motion the curtain fades in place with no wave.

items.title: Mirror Hall
items.tagline: Reflections that bend to your hand.
items.description: A hall of mirrors — the plate recedes through scaled, dimmed, alternately-flipped copies toward a vanishing point, and the corridor bends toward the pointer with the deepest reflections swinging farthest.

props.name: children
props.description: The reflected plate — keep it light, it renders N times.

props.name: copies / falloff / bend
props.description: Reflection count, scale step, and corridor bend per depth.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Only the front plate is real — every reflection is aria-hidden and inert.
Under reduced motion the corridor rests centered with no bend.

items.title: Frost Wipe
items.tagline: Wipe to read; stillness frosts it back.
items.description: A frosted pane over live content — wipe it clear with the pointer and the frost regrows after a moment of stillness; the grain is seeded per instance and the regrow loop runs only while there is frost to grow.

props.name: children
props.description: The content under the glass — always real DOM for AT.

props.name: brush / refrostDelay
props.description: Wipe radius in px and the idle delay before regrowth.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: WIPE CLEAR and REFROST chips give the keyboard the same control, and the pane state is announced politely.
Under reduced motion the refrost is instant rather than gradual; the regrow loop pauses offscreen and in hidden tabs.

items.title: Crumple Sheet
items.tagline: Wad it up; smooth it out.
items.description: Dismiss crumples the sheet into a paper ball — a deterministic facet mesh converges over the fading content, shading by how far each triangle collapsed, and the wad sits there as a button until you smooth it back out with a settle wobble.

props.name: children
props.description: The sheet's content.

props.name: crumpled / defaultCrumpled / onCrumpleChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled wad state.

props.name: dismissLabel / restoreLabel
props.description: Chip and wad wording.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The wad is a real button — focus hops from the dismiss chip to the wad and back, and both states are announced.
Under reduced motion the mesh never mounts; the sheet and wad swap with a fast fade.

items.title: Lenticular Card
items.tagline: Two faces, one ridge at a time.
items.description: A ridged-lens card holding two faces — sweeping across it flips one vertical ridge at a time, the wave trailing your hand, with a sheen band riding the active ridge; a house slider gives the keyboard the same sweep.

props.name: a / b
props.description: The two full-size faces, sliced across the ridges.

props.name: ridges
props.description: Strip count, clamped 4-28.

props.name: onDominantChange
props.description: Fires once when the majority face crosses over.

props.name: height
props.description: Card height in px.

usageNotes: The slider is always rendered and is the accessible control — arrows sweep by five, Home and End jump, and pointer sweeps keep its value honest.
Under reduced motion pointer tracking is off and the slider sweeps with instant flips.

items.title: Vanish Type
items.tagline: One word in the slot at a time.
items.description: A statement set along a ray to its vanishing point — scroll pulls each word into the reading slot in turn while the rest recede up the ray or drift off behind, every position scrubbed 1:1 from scroll.

props.name: words
props.description: Four to ten words of one statement.

props.name: onWordChange
props.description: Fires as the reading slot changes words.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: The full statement lives in an sr-only paragraph — the visual words are presentational, and the region scrolls natively from the keyboard.
Under reduced motion it renders as a plain wrapped headline with the active word underlined.

items.title: Extrude Title
items.tagline: Type with a block behind it.
items.description: A headline extruded in layered shadow — the block tilts with the pointer while the extrusion counter-rotates so the light reads as fixed, and pressing crushes the depth flat before it pops back on the recoil spring.

props.name: children
props.description: The title text — a string, it is layered.

props.name: depth / stepPx
props.description: Extrusion steps and offset per step.

props.name: onPress
props.description: Fires on the flattening press.

usageNotes: The title is a real button — Space and Enter flatten it exactly like a pointer press.
Under reduced motion the extrusion is static and presses flatten with fast tweens instead of springs.

items.title: Orbit Tags
items.tagline: A sphere of chips, one in reach.
items.description: A selectable tag sphere — chips ride a golden-angle lattice you can spin with momentum, arrows walk the roving tab stop while the sphere rotates each tag to the front, and selection glides its chip to face you.

props.name: tags
props.description: Up to sixteen chips on the lattice.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled single selection.

props.name: radius / height
props.description: Sphere radius and stage height.

usageNotes: Every chip is a real button on a roving tab stop; the ambient spin pauses under keyboard focus, hover, and offscreen.
Under reduced motion the sphere renders as a flat chip cloud with the same selection and keyboard.

items.title: Path Type
items.tagline: Type that rides its own wave.
items.description: A sentence set on an undulating ribbon — scroll draws the path in while the type rides its wave, cresting and dipping with a leading tick, every position scrubbed 1:1 from scroll.

props.name: text
props.description: One sentence to set on the ribbon.

props.name: amplitude / height
props.description: Wave height and scroll stage height.

props.name: onProgress
props.description: Streams the ride, deduped to hundredths.

usageNotes: The sentence lives in an sr-only paragraph; the SVG is presentational and the region scrolls natively from the keyboard.
Under reduced motion the ribbon renders fully drawn with the type at rest.

items.title: Billboard Run
items.tagline: Copy you drive past.
items.description: Headlines on angled roadside billboards — scroll drives past them down a converging road, each board growing from the vanishing point, banking by the camera, and sweeping off the frame, all scrubbed 1:1.

props.name: boards
props.description: Three to six billboards along the road.

props.name: onPass
props.description: Fires as each board sweeps past the camera.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only ordered list carries every headline; the road and boards are presentational and the region scrolls natively.
Under reduced motion the boards render as a flat stacked list with the nearest one accented.

items.title: Turn Word
items.tagline: Only the letters that differ turn.
items.description: One word becomes another letter by letter — cells half-turn edge-on, swap their glyph, and land on the snap spring in a cascade, while letters the two words share hold perfectly still.

props.name: words
props.description: The two states; the shorter is padded with figure spaces.

props.name: active / defaultActive / onTurn
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled facing word.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Whether the word itself is a switch button.

usageNotes: Interactive mode is a real role=switch — Space and Enter turn it, and the settled word is announced.
Under reduced motion the words crossfade whole with no letter turns.

items.title: Converge Quote
items.tagline: Lines that land in their own time.
items.description: A pull-quote scattered through depth — each line floats at its own distance and jitter until scroll assembles them onto one readable plane in staggered bands, the attribution arriving last under its rule.

props.name: lines
props.description: Two to five lines of one quote.

props.name: attribution
props.description: Arrives after the last line lands.

props.name: onConverge
props.description: Fires crossing 85% assembly, both directions.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only blockquote carries the full quote; the floating lines are presentational and the region scrolls natively.
Under reduced motion the quote renders assembled and static.

items.title: Shadow Script
items.tagline: The shadow has something to say.
items.description: Drag the lamp along its arc and the type's cast shadow stretches, skews, and finally becomes legible — because the shadow is a second message, sharpening as the light swings low.

props.name: text / secret
props.description: The standing headline and the message hidden in its shadow.

props.name: defaultAngle
props.description: Light angle, -60 to 60 degrees.

props.name: onReveal
props.description: Fires crossing legibility in either direction.

usageNotes: The lamp is a real slider — arrows nudge by four degrees, Home and End reach the extremes, and aria-valuetext reads the angle.
Both texts always live in an sr-only line; under reduced motion the shadow renders pre-stretched and legible.

items.title: Punch Type
items.tagline: Letters as windows.
items.description: A word die-cut through the surface — the letterforms are true SVG mask cutouts onto a vista behind, and sweeping the pointer shifts the scene so the windows fill with moving color.

props.name: text
props.description: One short word, punched at display size.

props.name: scene
props.description: The layer behind; defaults to a deterministic vista.

props.name: depth / height
props.description: Max scene counter-shift and stage height.

usageNotes: The plate is a labelled image with an adjacent interaction note; nothing inside is focusable.
Under reduced motion and coarse pointers the vista rests at a fixed offset.

items.title: Helix Index
items.tagline: Wind the spiral; read the front.
items.description: An index wound on a spiral staircase — winding the coil also travels it, so the front record always reads mid-stage; drag, scroll a notch, or arrow through, and Enter pulls the record facing you.

props.name: items
props.description: Five to twelve records on the coil.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onSelect
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled selection; default also seats the coil.

props.name: radius / pitch / stepDeg / height
props.description: Coil geometry and stage height.

usageNotes: One roving tab stop — arrows wind one record, Home and End glide the coil, and the settled record is announced.
Under reduced motion it renders as a flat list with the same buttons and selection.

items.title: Ring Dial
items.tagline: Stops that pull like magnets.
items.description: A lens ring in perspective — a knurled band whose detents pull the value in like magnets as you cross them; the fixed needle blinks on every land and the hub pulses the committed stop.

props.name: min / max / detents / step
props.description: Range and stops; explicit detents win over the step grid.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange / onInput
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled value; change fires per land, input streams live.

props.name: format
props.description: Formats the hub readout, band numerals, and aria-valuetext.

props.name: size
props.description: Dial diameter in px.

usageNotes: A real slider — arrows step between detents, Home and End reach the first and last, and aria-valuetext speaks the formatted stop.
Under reduced motion the ring renders flat and tracks the pointer one-to-one with no magnetic pull; the needle blink remains as the land cue.

items.title: Z Accordion
items.tagline: Sections that step back, not down.
items.description: An accordion that spends depth instead of height — the open sheet glides to the front while the rest step back into the rack, scaled, dimmed, and stacked so every header stays in reach.

props.name: items
props.description: The sheets; three to five read best.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled open sheet — exactly one at a time.

usageNotes: True accordion semantics — header buttons carry aria-expanded, panels are labelled regions, and arrows, Home, and End move between headers.
Under reduced motion it renders as a flat accordion in normal flow with instant expand and no recession.

items.title: Depth Menu
items.tagline: Branches recede; the trail hangs behind.
items.description: An inline menu that spends depth on hierarchy — entering a branch pushes the current level back into a hanging trail, a breadcrumb rail floats above for multi-level jumps, and focus always returns to the row you came from.

props.name: items
props.description: The tree; branch nodes carry children.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires on a leaf with its ancestor path.

props.name: depthGap
props.description: Perspective-honest recession per level.

usageNotes: WAI-ARIA menu keyboard — arrows move, Right or Enter descends, Left or Escape pops with focus returned, and level changes are announced.
Under reduced motion levels swap instantly and the breadcrumb alone carries the context.

items.title: Stage Tabs
items.tagline: Panels on a revolve.
items.description: Tabs staged like a theater revolve — the outgoing panel sweeps to one wing as the incoming one revolves in from the other, direction following tab order, over a floor shadow that squashes with the turn.

props.name: tabs
props.description: The tab set.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active tab.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Stage floor height in px.

usageNotes: Real tabs — roving tabindex, arrows auto-activate with wrap, Home and End jump, and the panel itself is focusable.
Under reduced motion panels crossfade instantly and the underline jumps without gliding.

items.title: Card Fan
items.tagline: Fan, sweep, play.
items.description: A hand of cards that fans open around a shared pivot — sweep to raise one, siblings part around it, and picking flies the card to a played slot where it lands on the recoil spring.

props.name: cards
props.description: Up to seven cards in the hand.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onSelect
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled played card.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled fan state.

props.name: cardWidth
props.description: Card width in px; height is 1.45×.

usageNotes: The open hand is a radiogroup — arrows move the raised card, Enter or Space plays it, Escape folds the hand and returns focus to the stack.
Under reduced motion the fan opens flat and instantly, raising is a highlight, and picks move without flight or bump.

items.title: Hallway Menu
items.tagline: Every stop looks down its own hallway.
items.description: A mega-menu of parallel hallways — sweeping the rail looks down each corridor in one-point perspective, doors hinge off the walls toward a far-wall plate, and the whole view swings sideways between stops.

props.name: hallways
props.type: { id, label, items: { id, label, hint? }[] }[]
props.description: Two to five hallways on the rail.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires when a door is chosen.

props.name: corridorHeight
props.description: Corridor stage height in px.

usageNotes: Rail buttons carry aria-expanded; ArrowDown enters the corridor, arrows walk the doors in documented wall order, and Escape returns to the rail.
Under reduced motion each corridor renders as a flat two-column panel with instant open and the same keyboard.

items.title: Deck Switcher
items.tagline: Views raked back, one zooms forward.
items.description: An app-switcher for views — open the deck and every view rakes back into a tilted stack; slide the rake by drag, wheel, or arrows, then commit and the chosen view zooms forward while the rest fold away.

props.name: views
props.description: Two to six views; all stay mounted so their state survives switches.

props.name: activeId / defaultActiveId / onActiveChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active view; fires only when the commit changes it.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The open deck is a listbox — arrows slide the rake, Home and End jump, Enter commits, and Escape cancels back to the previous view with focus returned.
Under reduced motion the deck is a flat list of title cards and commits swap instantly.

items.title: Flyover Map
items.tagline: The page, miniature and tilted.
items.description: A scroll region with its own tilted minimap — districts sized to their sections, a live viewport indicator riding the scroll, and a click that flies the view to any district on the glide spring.

props.name: sections
props.description: Three to six sections stacked in the scroll region.

props.name: onArrive
props.description: Fires when a flight lands or scrolling settles in a new section.

props.name: height
props.description: Viewport height in px.

usageNotes: The minimap is a navigation landmark of real buttons — aria-current tracks the active district and arrivals are announced politely.
Under reduced motion the map renders flat and district clicks jump instantly with no flight.

items.title: Gate Stepper
items.tagline: The gates ahead stay in sight.
items.description: A wizard where progress is distance — every remaining gate is visible ahead, receding through the current one; advancing sweeps the active gate past the camera while the line moves up a slot, and a refused gate shakes its head.

props.name: steps
props.description: Two to five gates.

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled position.

props.name: canAdvance
props.description: Gate check before Next; a refusal shakes and announces.

props.name: nextLabel / backLabel / doneLabel / onComplete
props.description: Footer wording and the finish callback.

usageNotes: The active gate is a labelled group and every change or refusal is announced politely; ahead and passed gates are hidden from AT.
Under reduced motion it is a flat stepper — no recession, instant swaps, refusals announce without the shake.

items.title: Hinge Nav
items.tagline: Doors on the frame, not drawers in it.
items.description: Navigation doors hinged on the frame edges — pull a side tab and the panel swings in from edge-on over the dimmed stage, bumping the frame as it lands; Escape or the stage swings it shut.

props.name: doors
props.description: One door per side; one open at a time.

props.name: children
props.description: The stage content the doors swing over.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires when a door row is chosen; the door closes after.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Tabs carry aria-expanded, the door is a labelled region, focus moves to the first row on open and returns to the tab on Escape.
Under reduced motion doors fade-slide in flat with no rotation or frame bump.

items.title: Pop Book
items.tagline: Cutouts that stand up from the fold.
items.description: A pop-up spread that opens with scroll — the two page halves relax apart while hinged cutouts stand up from the center fold rank by rank, back row first, every rise scrubbed 1:1.

props.name: pieces
props.description: Three to six cutouts; row 0 is the back rank.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Streams the spread, deduped to twentieths.

props.name: height
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only list carries every cutout; the spread is presentational and the region scrolls natively.
Under reduced motion the plate renders fully open and static.

items.title: Iso Blocks
items.tagline: A district that rises to meet you.
items.description: An isometric block city drawn entirely in flat 2D — every cuboid is three clip-path faces shaded from one hue, so the projection is Safari-proof by construction; blocks rise to the hand and light their roofs.

props.name: blocks
props.description: Four to twelve blocks on a near-square grid.

props.name: onInspect
props.description: Fires when a block is pressed.

props.name: cell
props.description: Grid cell width in px.

usageNotes: Every block is a real button — keyboard focus raises and lights it exactly like hover.
Under reduced motion the city reads as a flat top-down survey with the same buttons.

items.title: Lift Tray
items.tagline: Every tool floats to your hand.
items.description: Tools that float up to your hand — each plate levitates off the tray with a contact shadow that shrinks and softens as it rises, neighbors lifting in sympathy, item shadow and ground ellipse two views of one altitude.

props.name: items
props.description: Three to five tools on the tray.

props.name: onPick
props.description: Fires when a tool is pressed.

props.name: maxLift
props.description: Peak levitation in px.

usageNotes: Every tool is a real button — keyboard focus levitates it exactly like hover, and picks are announced.
Under reduced motion hover is a flat highlight and the ground shadows rest static.

items.title: Shaker Dome
items.tagline: The flakes take the long way down.
items.description: A keepsake dome over a diorama — shake it by hand and the seeded flakes swirl off the true semicircular shell, settling on gravity until the scene stands still and the loop stands down.

props.name: scene
props.description: The diorama under the glass; defaults to a minted monument.

props.name: flakes
props.description: Particle count, capped at eighty.

props.name: label / height
props.description: Plinth engraving and stage height.

usageNotes: The STIR button gives the keyboard a standard kick and stirs are announced; the sim idles the moment the flakes rest.
The loop pauses offscreen and in hidden tabs; under reduced motion one settled frame renders and the shake is disabled.

items.title: Daylight Dial
items.tagline: Drag the sky; the shadows obey.
items.description: A time-of-day dial over a skyline — one hour value drives the sky's keyframed color ramp, the sun and moon in anti-phase on their arc, sweeping building shadows with honest projection, and stars that keep their hours.

props.name: hour / defaultHour / onHourChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled 0-24 clock; settles announce integers.

props.name: height
props.description: Scene height in px.

usageNotes: The track is one slider — arrows step an hour, Page keys three, Home and End bound the day, and aria-valuetext reads the clock.
Naturally reduced-motion-safe: the scene scrubs one-to-one with the dial and merely loses its spring lag.

items.title: Cutout Town
items.tagline: Buildings that stand up from the plan.
items.description: A town plan whose buildings stand up from their plots as you scroll — each plot wakes before its band, the facade rotates upright from flat, and a base shadow widens beneath it; windows are lit deterministically per building.

props.name: buildings
props.description: Three to six facades and their plots.

props.name: onRaised
props.description: How many stand fully, deduped.

props.name: stageHeight
props.description: Scroll stage height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only list carries every building; the plan is presentational and the region scrolls natively.
Under reduced motion the town renders fully built and static.

items.title: Transit Window
items.tagline: The near fence outruns the far hills.
items.description: A train window whose landscape passes with your scroll — three looping parallax bands at honest speeds, mile markers that file past on the first lap, and a cabin sway that leans only with scroll velocity.

props.name: journey
props.description: Track length as a multiple of the stage height.

props.name: onMilestone
props.description: Fires as each of four mile markers passes.

props.name: height
props.description: Cabin height in px.

usageNotes: An sr-only line describes the scene; the region scrolls natively and the distance readout renders without re-renders.
Under reduced motion the landscape holds a mid-journey frame while the readout still tracks.

items.title: Spotlight Stage
items.tagline: Acts step into the light.
items.description: A dark stage where one sprung beam is the single truth — the rig cone and floor pool derive from it, every act brightens on a gaussian falloff as the light passes, and a click holds an act in the spot until Escape reopens the stage.

props.name: acts
props.description: Two to four plates on the stage.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onSpot
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled spotlit act.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Every act is a real button — keyboard focus summons the beam, Enter commits regardless of the spring, Escape reopens the stage.
Under reduced motion the house lights are even and selection is an accent border with no beam.

items.title: Pull Shelf
items.tagline: Tip a spine; read the spread.
items.description: Books on an instrument ledge — a spine tips out of the rank as your hand arrives, neighbors parting around it, and pulling it flies the book forward to open into a two-page spread while a dashed gap holds its slot.

props.name: books
props.type: { id, title, spineWidth?, height?, hue?, spread }[]
props.description: Four to eight volumes; geometry seeds deterministically per id.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled open volume — one at a time.

usageNotes: Every spine is a real disclosure button; focus moves to the spread's close chip on open and returns on Escape or close.
Under reduced motion spreads fade in place and spines highlight flat.

items.title: Turn Model
items.tagline: Drawn live, not filmed.
items.description: An object turntable drawn live — one yaw value projects the wireframe every frame, splitting edges into dim back and inked front paths, with platter ticks riding the same matrix; drag with momentum into 15° detents.

props.name: model
props.description: A 3D wireframe; defaults to the minted monument.

props.name: angle / defaultAngle / onAngleChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled yaw; settles announce snapped degrees.

props.name: size / elevationDeg
props.description: Stage size and the fixed camera tilt.

usageNotes: The stage is one slider — arrows step fifteen degrees, Page keys ninety, Home returns by the shortest path, and aria-valuetext reads the yaw.
Under reduced motion the platter jumps between detents while the projection still scrubs live.

items.title: Star Warp
items.tagline: Hold to jump to warp; steer the streaks.
items.description: A starfield streaming past the cabin — hold to jump to warp and the stars stretch into streaks, move to steer the vanishing point toward the pointer, then release and they ease back down to a cruise.

props.name: count
props.description: Star count, clamped to a sane maximum.

props.name: onWarp
props.description: Fires as the drive enters and leaves warp.

props.name: height
props.description: Field height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a keyboard Hold-to-warp button, so the effect is fully operable without a pointer.
The field pauses off-screen and when the tab is hidden, rebasing its clock so the stream never jumps.
Under reduced motion it paints one static sparse frame with no animation loop.

items.title: Depth Fog
items.tagline: Sweep the fog aside to read beneath it.
items.description: Drifting banks of fog roll across the panel at parallax depths and part around the pointer to reveal the survey beneath, closing back in the moment you move on.

props.name: children
props.description: The content revealed behind the fog (real DOM).

props.name: onClear
props.description: Fires as the pointer starts and stops parting the fog.

props.name: height
props.description: Panel height in px.

usageNotes: The content behind is real DOM, so it stays readable to assistive tech regardless of the fog above it.
The fog pauses off-screen and when hidden, rebasing its drift clock so it never jumps on resume.
Under reduced motion it holds a static, mostly-parted frame so the content is never trapped behind haze.

items.title: Ember Column
items.tagline: The embers lean toward you as you pass.
items.description: A column of embers rises off the forge flue, each spark brightening then fading as it climbs and swaying on its own draft; sweep the pointer across and the whole stream leans toward you, easing back to vertical as you leave.

props.name: count
props.description: Ember count, capped for cheapness.

props.name: onEmberPass
props.description: Streams a coarse embers-per-second rate, deduped.

props.name: height
props.description: Flue height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a polite live region; the pointer bends the stream with a vertical falloff.
The column pauses off-screen and when hidden, rebasing its clock so the rise never jumps.
Under reduced motion it paints one static frozen frame with no animation loop.

items.title: Constellation Map
items.tagline: Turn the sky; links form, click to pin a star.
items.description: A cloud of stars you turn with a drag — spin the sky and it coasts to a stop, links stitch between the stars nearest the cursor, and clicking a named star pins it with a label; the named stars are reachable from a keyboard list too.

props.name: stars
props.description: Named, pinnable stars plotted in the cloud.

props.name: extra
props.description: Unlabelled filler stars for density.

props.name: onPin
props.description: Fires the pinned star id, null when unpinned.

props.name: height
props.description: Sky height in px.

usageNotes: The named stars are reachable from a keyboard button list that pins and orbits one to the front.
The cloud coasts on release then idle-stops the loop once nothing is moving, to save battery.
Under reduced motion the sky is static, links forming on hover with a single repaint and no loop.

items.title: Rain Pane
items.tagline: Tap the glass; the rain splashes where you touch.
items.description: Rain runs down a glass pane at two depths — near streaks fall fast and bright, far ones slow and faint — and tapping the glass splashes a ring of droplets wherever you touch.

props.name: count
props.description: Total streaks across both depths, capped.

props.name: onSplash
props.description: Fires the { x, y } of each tap splash.

props.name: height
props.description: Pane height in px.

usageNotes: Cheap and gated — the rain pauses off-screen and when the tab is hidden, rebasing its clock.
Splashes pool to a fixed cap, so rapid taps stay light; each tap fires onSplash with its point.
Under reduced motion a few streaks freeze in place and a tap draws one static splash ring.

items.title: Sun Shaft
