items.tagline: Move through the beam; the motes swirl in your wake.
items.description: A shaft of light crosses the atrium with dust motes drifting through it, brighter where they cross the beam; move the pointer through and the motes swirl into an eddy in your wake, settling back as you pass.

props.name: count
props.description: Dust mote count, capped for cheapness.

props.name: onStir
props.description: Fires as the pointer enters and leaves the beam.

props.name: height
props.description: Panel height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a polite live region; the pointer spins a vortex through nearby motes.
The shaft pauses off-screen and when hidden, rebasing its clock so the drift never jumps.
Under reduced motion it paints one static lit frame with the motes at rest and no loop.

items.title: Firefly Field
items.tagline: Hold, and the fireflies gather to your hand.
items.description: Fireflies wander and blink at their own depths across a dusk meadow; press and hold and they gather to your hand, milling around it, then disperse back into the dark when you let go.

props.name: count
props.description: Firefly count, clamped to a cheap range.

props.name: onGather
props.description: Fires as the hold starts and stops.

props.name: height
props.description: Meadow height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a keyboard Gather button (Space or Enter held), so it works without a pointer.
The field pauses off-screen and when hidden, rebasing its clock over the pause.
Under reduced motion it holds a calm static scatter with no wander or gather loop.

items.title: Vapor Ring
items.tagline: Click the air; a ring of vapor rolls out.
items.description: Click the still air and a ring of vapor puffs out, its turbulent edge expanding toward you and drifting up as it thins to nothing; the loop sleeps whenever the last ring has faded.

props.name: onPuff
props.description: Fires the { x, y } of each puff.

props.name: height
props.description: Surface height in px.

usageNotes: Rings pool to a fixed cap, so rapid clicks stay cheap; each click fires onPuff with its point.
The loop idle-stops the instant the last ring has faded and wakes on the next puff.
Under reduced motion a click draws one static ring, replaced on the next click, with no loop.

items.title: Gravity Well
items.tagline: Draw the well; fling fast to slingshot bodies free.
items.description: Bodies orbit a gravity well that follows the pointer — a softened pull holds them in ellipses, motion trails streaking their paths; flick the well fast and a stream slingshots free before the field draws it back.

props.name: count
props.description: Orbiting body count, capped for cheapness.

props.name: onFling
props.description: Fires when a fling slings bodies free and when it settles.

props.name: height
props.description: Field height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a polite live region; the pointer is the well, easing back to center when it leaves.
The field pauses off-screen and when hidden, rebasing its clock so the orbits never jump.
Under reduced motion it paints one static frame of concentric orbital rings with no loop.

items.title: Paper Flight
items.tagline: Click the sky; a glider swoops across on its path.
items.description: Folded gliders drift across the hangar at their own depths; click the sky and one launches on a bezier flight, banking to face its path and scaling with the arc before it fades at the far edge.

props.name: count
props.description: Ambient drifting gliders, clamped to a cheap range.

props.name: onLaunch
props.description: Fires the launched flight index per launch.

props.name: height
props.description: Hangar height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a keyboard Launch button, so a flight can be sent without a pointer.
Flights pool to a fixed cap, so rapid clicks stay cheap; each launch fires onLaunch with its index.
Under reduced motion the gliders pose at rest and a launch drops one static mid-flight glider, no loop.

items.title: Terrain Relief
items.tagline: Orbit the relief; a node reads its elevation.
items.description: A data heightmap drawn as a rotatable wireframe terrain — the grid projects into an oblique surface you orbit by dragging, strands painter-ordered by depth and fading into the distance, and hovering a node lifts a readout of its elevation.

props.name: data
props.description: Elevations by [row][col]; normalized internally.

props.name: onProbe
props.description: Fires the probed { row, col, value }, null on leave.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in px.

usageNotes: Drag orbits the surface; ArrowLeft/Right rotate and Home resets to the default oblique angle.
A node hover or focus fires onProbe with the elevation in original units and lifts a readout.
Under reduced motion the surface holds one static oblique frame while probing stays live.

items.title: Little Planet
items.tagline: Spin the planet; a section curves up to the top.
items.description: Sections wrapped around a tiny planet's rim — spin the planet and each curves up to the top slot, growing to full size as it surfaces while the far side tucks behind the horizon; release snaps the nearest section home.

props.name: sections
props.description: Sections spaced evenly around the planet rim.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or initial surfaced section id.

props.name: onSurface
props.description: Fires the section id once it settles at the top.

props.name: radius / height
props.description: Planet radius and stage height in px.

usageNotes: The planet is a focusable control — arrows spin one section to the top, Home returns to the first.
A release snaps the nearest section to the top the short way; the controlled value is honored.
Under reduced motion the sections sit in a static ring and surface with an instant jump.

items.title: Arc Routes
items.tagline: Hover a route; a rider arcs to its port.
items.description: Great-circle arcs lifting off a flat map — pins plot ports across the panel and each route bows a quadratic arc between two of them, arching higher the longer the hop; hovering or focusing a route brightens its arc and rides a marker along it from origin to destination.

props.name: pins
props.description: Ports plotted by normalized x, y across the map.

props.name: routes
props.description: Arcs between pins, referenced by from and to ids.

props.name: onRide
props.description: Fires the ridden route id, null when it ends.

props.name: height
props.description: Map height in px.

usageNotes: Routes ride from a legend of real buttons, so they are keyboard-reachable and announce on focus.
The rider is a bezier-derived marker travelling a tween from origin to destination while the route is active.
Under reduced motion no rider travels; the arc brightens and marks its midpoint instead.

items.title: Radar Scope
items.tagline: The sweep lights each contact; click to inspect.
items.description: A polar approach scope whose sweep beam rakes the display once a cycle, lighting each contact as it crosses its bearing and leaving it to fade in afterglow; click a contact to pin a callout, or reach every one through the keyboard list beside the scope.

props.name: blips
props.description: Contacts placed by bearing (deg) and range (0..1).

props.name: onInspect
props.description: Fires the inspected contact id, null when cleared.

props.name: sweepPeriod
props.description: Seconds per full sweep rotation.

props.name: height
props.description: Scope height in px.

usageNotes: The canvas is aria-hidden with a parallel button list, so every contact is inspectable from the keyboard.
The sweep pauses off-screen and when the tab is hidden, rebasing its clock so it never jumps on resume.
Under reduced motion the scope paints one static frame with every contact lit and no animation loop.

items.title: Fisheye Grid
items.tagline: Sweep the lens; tiles bulge up beneath it.
items.description: A magnifier you sweep across a grid — tiles under the lens bulge up and spread apart in a radial fisheye, the largest riding to the front while the rest ease back to rest, and the tile at the lens center reads out as you go.

props.name: cells
props.description: Tiles laid on a near-square grid under the lens.

props.name: onFocusCell
props.description: Fires the tile at the lens center, null off-grid.

props.name: lensRadius / strength
props.description: Lens reach in px and bulge magnitude.

props.name: height
props.description: Grid height in px.

usageNotes: On fine pointers the lens glides under the cursor; on touch it drags a puck; arrows move it a tile at a time.
Every tile derives its bulge from the shared lens value, so nothing writes state per pointer-move.
Under reduced motion the lens drops and a discrete focused tile scales up in place instead.

items.title: Section Cut
items.tagline: Drag the plane; a stratum opens at the cut.
items.description: Drag a cutting plane down through a layered core sample and the block above the plane clips away, opening each stratum at a hatched section face as the plane crosses it, its label called out and a depth readout tracking the cut.

props.name: strata
props.description: Bands top to bottom, each with a thickness and tone.

props.name: onCut
props.description: Fires the stratum at the cut face, null above grade.

props.name: height
props.description: Core height in px.

usageNotes: The plane is a role=slider — drag tracks 1:1, arrows step it, PageUp/Down jump a whole stratum.
onCut reports the intersected stratum, deduped; the depth readout derives from the plane, never a per-frame write.
Under reduced motion the plane and the clip resolve instantly with the same section semantics.

items.title: Compass Needle
items.tagline: Drag the dial; the needle wobbles to a point.
items.description: A bearing picker with a magnetic settle — the needle tracks the pointer bearing as you drag around the rose, then on release swings the short way to the nearest cardinal detent and wobbles home like a magnetized compass; the arrow keys step it point by point.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or initial bearing, 0 (N) clockwise to 359.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires the settled bearing once it snaps to a detent.

props.name: detent
props.description: Detent grid in degrees; 45 gives the 8-point rose.

props.name: height
props.description: Dial size in px.

usageNotes: The dial is a role=slider — arrows step one detent, Home returns to north, and the value text names the cardinal point.
Release snaps the short way to the nearest detent on the recoil spring, its two bounces reading as magnetism.
Under reduced motion the needle jumps to the pointer bearing and the detent with no wobble.

items.title: Blueprint Rise
items.tagline: Scroll the plan up into a standing model.
items.description: A flat floor plan that stands up as you scroll — the plan tilts from a top-down view to a three-quarter oblique while every wall extrudes off its floor line into a line-art model, a rise readout tracking the climb from plan to structure.

props.name: walls
props.description: Wall segments in 0..1 plan coordinates, with a height.

props.name: labels
props.description: Room labels on the floor plane.

props.name: journey / height
props.description: Scroll track length in stages and stage height in px.

props.name: onRise
props.description: Streams the rise 0..1, deduped to twentieths.

usageNotes: Pure SVG faux-3D — no CSS 3D — so the extruded model stays Safari-proof.
An sr-only line describes the plan; the region scrolls natively and the model is presentational.
Under reduced motion the model holds a mid-rise composition while the readout still tracks scroll.

items.title: Explode View
items.tagline: Toggle to fan the assembly apart, labelled.
items.description: A stacked assembly that separates on command — toggle it and the parts fan apart along an isometric axis in a staggered cascade, a leader line running from each part to its label; toggle back and they nest into one solid again.

props.name: parts
props.description: Assembly parts, ordered bottom to top.

props.name: exploded / defaultExploded
props.description: Controlled or initial exploded state.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires the new state when the assembly is toggled.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Parts are focusable buttons — hovering or focusing one lights the part and its leader-lined label.
The separation staggers on a cascade so the outer parts lead; the controlled exploded prop is honored.
Under reduced motion the assembly swaps instantly between nested and fanned, leaders and all.

items.title: Matrix Rise
items.tagline: Toggle the grid up into a city of bars.
items.description: A heat grid that stands up into a bar city — toggle it and every cell extrudes into an isometric bar whose height tracks its value, the field rising in a diagonal cascade; toggle back and it lies flat as a heatmap again.

props.name: data
props.description: The value matrix; drives both color and bar height.

props.name: rowLabels / colLabels
props.description: Optional axis labels.

props.name: risen / defaultRisen
props.description: Controlled or initial raised state.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires the new state when the grid is toggled.

usageNotes: The bars are clip-path faces, not CSS 3D, so the city stays Safari-proof.
Hovering or focusing a cell reads its value; the controlled risen prop is honored.
Under reduced motion the grid swaps instantly between heatmap and city.

items.title: Swing Door
items.tagline: Past the detent or slammed home.
items.description: A hinged door with handle physics — drag it past the detent and it swings wide on the glide spring; let go early and it slams home, shuddering the frame and puffing a dust line at the jamb.

props.name: children
props.description: What waits in the doorway.

props.name: doorFace
props.description: Artwork on the door; defaults to a minted panel.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled door state.

props.name: height
props.description: Frame height in px.

usageNotes: The handle is a real button with aria-expanded; Escape slams the door and focus returns to the handle.
Under reduced motion the door slides flat with no slam or shudder.

items.title: Hatch Board
items.tagline: Every lid rides its own spring.
items.description: A grid of spring-loaded hatches — every lid pops open on its own snap spring to reveal the well beneath, latches shut with a click pulse, and the whole board can cascade open or closed from a corner.

props.name: hatches
props.description: Four to nine hatches; the label names each disclosure.

props.name: openIds / defaultOpenIds / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled open set.

props.name: columns / cellAspect
props.description: Board shape.

usageNotes: Each lid is a real disclosure button; wells are labelled regions, inert while shut, and the open count is announced.
Under reduced motion lids fade flat with no pops or cascade.

items.title: Gear Train
items.tagline: Ratios you can feel.
items.description: Three meshed gears with honest ratios — drag any wheel and the transmission carries your hand to a needle on the output shaft; teeth stay interleaved at every angle by construction, and releases coast on a velocity-seeded drift.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled needle value, 0-100; fires once per settle.

props.name: teeth
props.description: Drive, idler, and output tooth counts.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The train is one slider — arrows step by two, Page keys by ten, Home and End glide the rails, and every settle is announced by value.
Under reduced motion gears track the hand one-to-one with no coast; the tooth-tick blink remains as an opacity cue.

items.title: Commit Lever
items.tagline: Past the guard, then all the way.
items.description: A two-stage action lever — the pull stiffens at the guard notch and the flap swings aside as you push through to arm; full travel commits with a thunk, locks, and glides home after the reset.

props.name: onCommit
props.description: Required — fires exactly once per full travel.

props.name: onArmChange
props.description: Tracks the armed stage, deduped.

props.name: commitLabel / resetDelay / disabled
props.description: Wording, auto-return delay (0 holds), and the safety.

usageNotes: The grip is a real button — first press arms, second commits, Escape disarms; every stage is announced.
Under reduced motion the lever snaps between its three stations with no thunk or lamp blink.

items.title: Crank Reel
items.tagline: Wind forward; the freewheel only clicks.
items.description: A hand-crank that winds progress onto a visible spool — forward turns bank units with ratchet ticks while backward cranking just chatters on the freewheel; the drum trails the handle on the glide spring.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled wound units; fires per unit.

props.name: max / unitsPerTurn / reversible
props.description: Capacity, gearing, and whether backward unwinds.

props.name: onSlip / spoolLabel
props.description: Freewheel slip callback and the wound material's name.

usageNotes: The rig is one slider — arrows wind a unit, Home and End run the rails with a single batched announcement, and slips announce as freewheel.
Under reduced motion the crank and drum move instantly and the pawl kick becomes an opacity blink.

items.title: Pulley Lift
items.tagline: The counterweight lands the car.
items.description: A dumbwaiter on one honest travel value — haul the platform, the counterweight, or either rope fall, and the car settles to the nearest floor with an elastic arrival while the sheave turns by exactly the rope it passed.

props.name: floors
props.description: Two to four floors, ground first.

props.name: floor / defaultFloor / onFloorChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled floor; fires on settle.

props.name: height
props.description: Shaft height in px.

usageNotes: The frame is a vertical slider and every floor tab is a real button with aria-current; arrivals are announced by label.
Under reduced motion the car jumps between floors with no glide or bounce.

items.title: Combo Dials
items.tagline: Three dials, one agreement.
items.description: A combination lock of stacked cylinder dials — digits sweep the rim under your drag, settle into detents with a click, and when every dial agrees with the setting the bolt slides open.

props.name: length
props.description: Dial count, two to five.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled digits; fires per settled digit.

props.name: secret / onUnlock
props.description: The setting to match and the single-fire unlock callback.

usageNotes: Each dial is a spinbutton — arrows step with wrap, typing a digit glides straight to it, and settles are announced per dial.
Under reduced motion digits jump detent by detent and the bolt opens with a fast fade; near-misses never announce proximity.

items.title: Zipper Seam
items.tagline: The seam parts above the pull.
items.description: Fabric halves joined by a toothed seam — draw the pull down and they part in a V above it, teeth shearing aside along the edges, with a shiver when the yank lands fully open.

props.name: children
props.description: What lies in the seam.

props.name: progress / defaultProgress / onProgressChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled 0-100 opening; fires on settle.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: The pull is a vertical slider — arrows step by five, Page keys by twenty, Home and End seal and open; ends snap and announce.
Under reduced motion the seam tracks the hand one-to-one with no snaps or shiver.

items.title: Trapdoor Drop
items.tagline: The long way down, on purpose.
items.description: A two-stage disposal platform — arming slides the bolts aside while the item wobbles, confirming swings both leaves down from their outer hinges, and the item accelerates into the well past blinking depth rings before the doors clap shut.

props.name: children / itemKey
props.description: The item on the doors; change the key to lower in the next one.

props.name: onDrop
props.description: Fires exactly once when the item has fallen through.

props.name: armLabel / dropLabel / disarmLabel
props.description: The two-stage wording.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Dismissal is always two presses — arm, then confirm — with Escape backing out; every stage is announced.
Under reduced motion the item fades instantly on confirm with the same two-stage semantics.

items.title: Drawbridge
items.tagline: Chains out, deck down, crossing proved.
items.description: A span between two content islands — lowering pays the chains out from the gantry as the deck swings down, thumps the far abutment on the recoil, and a runner crosses once to prove the connection before the far bank wakes.

props.name: near / far
props.description: The two banks; the far one is reachable only while bridged.

props.name: bridged / defaultBridged / onBridgedChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled span state.

props.name: lowerLabel / raiseLabel
props.description: Toggle wording.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: One real toggle with aria-expanded; the far bank is inert and dimmed until the deck lands, and both states are announced.
Under reduced motion the deck fades between raised and bridged with no chains or runner.

items.title: Chip Cloud
items.tagline: Pick a chip; it flies to the tray.
items.description: A multi-select field split in two: a tray of what you have picked and a cloud of what is left. Picking a chip flies the very same pill out of the cloud and into the tray while the survivors close the gap; picking it again flies it home.

props.name: chips
props.description: The full roster; picked chips gather in the tray.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or initial picks, in pick order.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires the picked ids whenever the set changes.

props.name: label / placeholder
props.description: Group label, and the copy shown while the tray is empty.

usageNotes: Every chip is a real toggle button, so the field is operable with Tab and Space alone.
A picked chip changes container, which replaces its DOM node — the chip is re-focused as it lands so the keyboard never loses its place.
Under reduced motion chips reposition in a single frame; same picks, order, and announcements.

items.title: Rating Arc
items.tagline: Sweep the arc; the score fills to your thumb.
items.description: A rating that fills along a 220-degree arc — the fill draws itself and the thumb rides the curve rather than cutting across it, while sweeping the arc paints a ghost of the score you would commit.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or initial score, 0..max.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires the committed score.

props.name: max / step
props.description: Top of the scale and its granularity; 0.5 gives half marks.

props.name: label / readout
props.description: Accessible name, and whether to print the score beneath.

usageNotes: Reports as a slider — arrows step, Home and End jump the ends, and aria-valuetext reads the score rather than a bare number.
The hover ghost is driven straight off motion values, so sweeping the arc never costs a React render.
Under reduced motion the fill and thumb land in a single frame; same scale and commits.

items.title: Swatch Lock
items.tagline: The pick locks; the rest step back.
items.description: A grid of colour swatches where the pick locks in: a ring draws itself around the chosen chip while the rest ease back to let it stand alone. Locking is the whole affordance — you can see what is held without reading anything.

props.name: swatches
props.description: Each carries an id, a label, and any CSS colour.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or initial pick.

props.name: name
props.description: Renders a hidden native radio per swatch so forms post the pick.

props.name: columns
props.description: Grid columns; Up and Down step by exactly this many.

usageNotes: Full APG radio keyboard on a roving tabindex — Left and Right walk the roster and wrap, Up and Down step a row, Home and End jump the ends, Space selects.
Colour is never the only cue: every swatch carries a label, and the label is what assistive tech announces.
Under reduced motion the ring is simply there and the dim is a colour change; the first paint never animates.

items.title: Skeleton Weave
items.tagline: The placeholder weaves, then hands over.
items.description: A placeholder that holds the shape of what is coming, then hands over. A sheen sweeps each row on a diagonal, staggered down the stack so the block reads as one woven surface; when the content arrives the placeholder fades and the real thing rises the last few pixels into place.

props.name: loading
props.description: While true the placeholder holds the space.

props.name: rows
props.description: Placeholder row widths; longest first reads like prose.

props.name: children
props.description: The real content, revealed when loading turns false.

usageNotes: The placeholder is aria-hidden and the region is aria-busy, so assistive tech is told the state once rather than made to read decorative bars.
A polite live region announces the wait.
Under reduced motion the placeholder is a still surface and the content simply appears.

items.title: Stage Progress
items.tagline: See which stage is slow, not just a percent.
items.description: Progress that admits it has parts. Each stage owns a segment: the ones behind you are filled and ticked, the one in flight fills to its own fraction or breathes when it cannot say, and the ones ahead wait as empty track — so you can see which stage is slow.

props.name: stages
props.description: The ordered stages; each owns a segment and a label.

props.name: current
props.description: Index of the stage in flight; earlier ones have landed.

props.name: progress
props.description: 0..1 within the current stage; omit for indeterminate.

usageNotes: Fills ride scaleX off a left origin rather than an animated width, so the bar never triggers layout.
The strip reports as one progressbar whose aria-valuetext names the stage, not a percentage.
Under reduced motion fills land in a frame, the tick is simply there, and the indeterminate stage holds steady.

items.title: Alert Bar
items.tagline: A notice that takes its own space, by severity.
items.description: An inline notice that takes its own space rather than floating over the work. Opening glides the row down from zero height while a severity stripe draws itself down the leading edge; dismissing collapses it back and the space closes behind it, so nothing below jumps.

props.name: open / defaultOpen
props.description: Controlled or initial visibility.

props.name: severity
props.description: Sets the stripe, the title tone, and how loudly it speaks.

props.name: title / children
props.description: The heading and an optional body.

usageNotes: Severity sets the role: warnings and failures mount as an assertive alert; info and success report politely and wait their turn.
Colour is paired with a title tone, never asked to carry the meaning alone.
Under reduced motion the row and its stripe are simply present or gone.

items.title: Command Deck
items.tagline: A palette that arms before it fires.
items.description: A command palette that arms before it fires — a deliberate fill sweeps the selected row before execution, so destructive commands never feel accidental.

props.name: commands
props.description: { id, label, hint?, icon?, section?, keywords?, destructive?, run } per command.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled visibility.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Global ⌘K / Ctrl+K toggle listener.

props.name: inline / portal
props.description: Inline renders just the panel (docs/demos); portal overlays into body with focus trap and scroll lock.

props.name: recentKey
props.description: localStorage key for the five most recent command ids.

usageNotes: Full combobox semantics with focus trap and restore; Escape mid-arm cancels the sweep.
Under reduced motion the arming sweep becomes an instant fill with a deliberate 120ms pause.

items.title: Access Panel
items.tagline: Sign-in that unlocks like a vault.
items.description: Sign-in that unlocks like a vault — steps ride a gantry rail, OTP digits drop into their cells, and the right code throws a breaker bolt open.

props.name: expectedCode
props.description: The six-digit code that throws the bolt.

props.name: onVerify
props.description: Fires with the entered code on every attempt.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires once when the correct code lands.

props.name: email
props.description: Prefills the email field.

usageNotes: One hidden input with autocomplete="one-time-code" drives the six visual cells — the accessibility-correct OTP pattern.
Under reduced motion the rail slides become fades and the rejection nudge is skipped; the alert still announces.

items.title: Signal Center
items.tagline: An inbox that files itself.
items.description: An inbox that files itself — signals arrive on the conveyor, swipe away with real velocity, and clear-all sweeps the floor in a cascade.

props.name: signals / defaultSignals / onSignalsChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled feed; Signal = { id, source, title, detail?, time, read? }.

props.name: onArchive
props.description: Fires per archived signal, including clear-all.

props.name: title
props.description: Header title next to the live unread readout.

usageNotes: Archiving is keyboard-reachable via a per-row button; swiping is the fast path, not the only path.
Under reduced motion arrivals and exits become fades and clear-all loses its stagger.

items.title: Media Console
items.tagline: A media island that unfolds into a console.
items.description: A media island that unfolds into a console — the pill morphs open into transport, a caliper timeline, and a scope-scrubbed volume.

props.name: tracks
props.description: { id, title, artist, duration } — playback is simulated; the JSDoc shows wiring a real audio element.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Start as the pill or the full console.

usageNotes: Complete keyboard transport; Escape collapses the console back to the pill.
Under reduced motion the morph becomes a crossfade and the waveform holds still.

items.title: Checkout Receipt
items.tagline: Payment that prints its proof.
items.description: Payment that prints its proof — hold to pay, then a receipt feeds out of the slot line by line, tears off, and takes a PAID stamp.

props.name: items
props.description: Line items ({ name, price }) summed into the total.

props.name: currency
props.description: Price prefix.

props.name: onPay
props.description: Fires when the hold completes.

usageNotes: The receipt is real text in a definition list; only the barcode is decorative.
Under reduced motion the receipt appears whole and the stamp fades in.

items.title: Intake Tray
items.tagline: Files land, physically.
items.description: Files land, physically — dropped files fall into the tray with a squash, shingle into a stack, fill their gauge rings, and slide to the processed rail.

props.name: onFiles
props.description: Receives each accepted batch.

props.name: accept / maxFiles
props.description: Accepted types hint and tray capacity.

props.name: simulate
props.description: Hash-driven demo progress; the JSDoc documents wiring real uploads.

props.name: ref
props.description: Imperative addFiles() for programmatic intake.

usageNotes: The drop zone is a real button with a labeled native file input — fully keyboard operable.
Under reduced motion chips stack neatly with fades; the gauge rings still fill.

items.title: Readout Grid
items.tagline: Dashboard stats as instrument cards.
items.description: Dashboard stats as instrument cards — a carry-rolling counter, a self-drawing sparkline, a split-flap delta, and a needle gauge, mounted with one cascade.

props.name: metrics
props.description: Optional full override of the four cards: counter, sparkline, flap, and gauge shapes.

usageNotes: Each card is an article whose label reads naturally to screen readers; chart visuals carry sr-only values.
Under reduced motion cards render in place, the sparkline arrives fully drawn, and the needle jumps.

items.title: Launch Checklist
items.tagline: Setup steps that stamp themselves done.
items.description: Onboarding checklist where ticks draw themselves, finished steps strike through and settle to the bottom, and completing the set lands a CALIBRATED stamp.

props.name: steps
props.description: Step definitions: id, title, optional description.

props.name: completed / defaultCompleted
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled set of completed step ids.

props.name: onCompletedChange
props.description: Fires on every toggle with the new completed set.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires once when the final step completes.

usageNotes: Rows are native checkboxes under the hood — the whole block is keyboard and screen-reader operable.
Under reduced motion rows reorder instantly and the stamp fades in; the progress track still reports value via ARIA.

items.title: Iris Menu
items.tagline: Actions bloom from where you pressed.
items.description: Actions bloom from where you pressed — items launch from the trigger's center to seats along the freest quadrant's arc, and fold back in on close.

props.name: items
props.description: Up to six: { id, icon, label, onSelect, disabled?, destructive? }.

props.name: placement
props.description: Auto measures the viewport and blooms into the roomiest quadrant.

props.name: radius
props.description: Distance from trigger center to each seat.

usageNotes: Arrow keys rotate focus around the ring; Escape closes and restores the trigger.
Under reduced motion items fade in already seated — no travel.

items.title: Overflow Rail
items.tagline: More actions, sprung from the dots.
items.description: More actions, sprung from the dots — the pill rail morphs open inline while primaries yield with a recoil part and secondaries cascade in.

props.name: primary / secondary
props.description: Always-visible actions and the set revealed by the ⋯ trigger.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled expansion.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible toolbar name.

usageNotes: One toolbar: arrows rove across every visible action; Escape collapses and refocuses the trigger.
Under reduced motion the width jumps and secondaries fade in place.

items.title: Beacon
items.tagline: One capsule, every live activity.
items.description: One capsule, every live activity — the shell morphs between timer, upload, call, and now-playing views with blur crossfades, corners pinned.

props.name: activity
props.description: Discriminated union: timer (endsAt), upload (progress), call (accept/decline), playing (title/artist); null collapses to a standby pill.

props.name: expanded / defaultExpanded / onExpandedChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled detail row.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Renders a dismiss action in the detail row.

usageNotes: Call buttons are reachable while collapsed; activity changes announce once, debounced.
Under reduced motion the shell resizes instantly and the loops hold still.

items.title: Field Report
items.tagline: Feedback that files itself.
items.description: Feedback that files itself — a notch rating with a gliding indicator, a growing note field, and a submit that folds the form into a slot under a LOGGED stamp.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Fires on valid submit; rating is 1–5.

props.name: prompt / endLabels
props.description: The question and the rail's end labels.

props.name: resetAfterMs
props.description: Fades a fresh form back in after filing.

usageNotes: The rating is a real radiogroup — arrows move the indicator, and empty submits nudge with a role=alert line.
Under reduced motion the filing collapse becomes a fade and the stamp lands statically.

items.title: Not Found
items.tagline: Sweep complete. Sector empty.
items.description: Sweep complete, sector empty — a radar arc scans a quiet grid while the 404 numeral deciphers itself, with home and command-deck exits.

props.name: homeHref
props.description: Return-to-base link target.

props.name: onCommandDeck
props.description: Renders the ghost command-deck action when provided.

props.name: code / message
props.description: The cipher numeral and the rising subline.

usageNotes: The heading carries real text for screen readers; the cipher layer and radar are decorative.
Under reduced motion the sweep freezes mid-arc and the numeral renders plainly.

items.title: Forecast Card
items.tagline: Every vote moves every bar.
items.description: Every vote moves every bar — one commit renormalizes the whole field while percentages carry-roll and the leader tick migrates to the new front-runner.

props.name: question / options
props.description: 2–4 outcomes as { id, label, votes }; options are always the source of counts.

props.name: votedId / defaultVotedId / onVote
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled viewer vote.

props.name: allowRevote
props.description: Let the viewer move their vote between outcomes.

props.name: closesAt
props.description: Compact mono CLOSES footer line.

usageNotes: Rows are aria-pressed buttons; each vote announces the new percentage and leadership once.
Under reduced motion widths jump and the leader tick teleports; the readouts pulse instead of rolling.

items.title: Balance Card
items.tagline: A balance with a private side.
items.description: A balance with a private side — the numeral carry-rolls behind a privacy blur, a sparkline draws itself, and the card flips to its activity face.

props.name: balance / format / delta / series
props.description: The carry-rolling amount, its delta chip, and the sparkline data.

props.name: activity
props.description: Back-face rows: { id, label, amount, time }.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Fires from the action row.

props.name: defaultHidden
props.description: Start with the balance blurred.

usageNotes: The hidden face is inert and aria-hidden — the flip never traps focus or leaks taps.
Under reduced motion the flip is instant, the sparkline arrives drawn, and the blur toggles without a tween.

items.title: Exchange Panel
items.tagline: Two units, one clean swap.
items.description: Two units, one clean swap — the edited side is live, the computed side carry-rolls after a debounce, and swapping keeps focus while contents trade places.

props.name: units
props.description: Linear factors to a shared base unit; groups render a grouped select.

props.name: feeRate
props.description: Fraction applied to the converted side, shown as a fee row.

props.name: onChange / onDirectionChange
props.description: Conversion updates and swap events.

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Delay before the computed side rolls.

usageNotes: One side holds authority; the other is always derived — swapping transfers authority with the gesture and refocuses the input.
Under reduced motion contents swap instantly and the readout uses its highlight fallback.

items.title: Utils
items.tagline: cn() — class composition.
items.description: Class-name composition helper shared by every component.

items.title: Calibration Set
items.tagline: flick · snap · glide · drift · recoil.
items.description: Kinetiq's five calibrated springs plus the tween scale, cascade budget, and exit rules — the shared physics vocabulary every component draws from.

items.title: useMotionSafe
items.tagline: Reduced motion, decided once.
items.description: Single source of truth for reduced-motion decisions: combines the OS preference with an optional app-level override context.

items.title: Spatial Set
items.tagline: Perspective, detents, orbits, lift.
items.description: The shared geometry vocabulary of the spatial instruments — house perspective range, angle detents, contact-lift shadows, orbit projection, and deterministic seeding.

items.title: usePointerTilt
items.tagline: Pointer → sprung perspective.
items.description: Normalized pointer tracking mapped to sprung tilt values — the house idiom for pointer-driven perspective, with an underdamped rebalance on leave and a fine-pointer gate.

items.title: Agent Rules
items.tagline: The design-system operating rules for agents.
items.description: Kinetiq's operating rules for coding agents: the five-spring motion language, the tween scale, the 600ms cascade budget, the reduced-motion policy, token usage, and composition guidance. Installs as AGENTS.md at your repo root so your agent stays on the system's vocabulary.
